ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-26-2024 Text Ruling

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2024 Continued To Jul-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kurt Huysentruyt for Aloysius Cruz, Administrator (via Zoom).
Aloysius Cruz, Administrator, is present in the courtroom.

Discussion was held regarding the Order to Show Cause for failure to appear at the October 15, 2024 hearing. Mr. Huysentruyt explained his failure to appear was the result of a calendaring mishap and apologized to the court. The court informed counsel that calendaring mistakes do not constitute good cause and imposed a $250 sanction.

Mr. Huysentruyt confirmed his request to extend administration until June 30, 2025. The court approved the extension of the administration through June 30, 2025 and scheduled a hearing regarding status of administration for July 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Counsel was ordered to file a status report by June 17, 2025.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Continued To Nov-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney Kurt D. Huysentruyt to appear on November 26, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator Aloysius Cruz to appear on November 26, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a petition for final distribution has not been filed.

The Petition for Additional Time to Administer the Estate and Status Report is continued to November 26, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.
